summary: SEO Overhaul Testing Complete - All 12 test cases PASSED. Verified: 1) Service pages have exactly 1 FAQPage, 1 BreadcrumbList, 1 Service, 1 LocalBusiness schema (no duplicates), 2) City/brand pages have unique meta descriptions (NOT fallback text), 3) CityUniqueContent renders with ZIP codes, case studies, testimonials on desktop and mobile, 4) BrandUniqueContent renders with model names on desktop and mobile, 5) Canonical URLs are without trailing slashes, 6) Schema cleanup works on client-side navigation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO overhaul is complete. react-helmet-async was replaced with direct DOM manipulation (useSchema hook + SEOMetaTags component). All schemas are now properly managed with unique IDs and cleanup on navigation. City pages use CityUniqueContent.jsx with data from cityLocalData.js. Brand pages use BrandUniqueContent.jsx with data from brandLocalData.js.

TEST_3_san_francisco_unique_desc.meta_description: Professional appliance repair in San Francisco. Same-day service available. Licensed technicians, 180-day warranty. Serving all SF neighborhoods. Call (760) 543-5733.

TEST_4_samsung_brand_page.meta_description: Samsung appliance repair in San Francisco & Bay Area. Ice buildup specialists. Same-day service, 180-day warranty. Call (760) 543-5733.

TEST_5_daly_city_unique_content.meta_description: Professional appliance repair in Daly City. Same-day service in Westlake, Serramonte, and all neighborhoods. Coastal climate experts. $60 diagnostic. Call (760) 543-5733.

TEST_9_wine_cooler_unique_desc.meta_description: Professional wine cooler repair in San Francisco & Bay Area. Temperature control, compressor repair. $60 diagnostic. Call (760) 543-5733.

TEST_10_maintenance_unique_desc.meta_description: Preventive appliance maintenance in San Francisco, Peninsula & Marin County. $60 residential, $100 commercial diagnostic fee. Licensed technicians, 180-day warranty.

seo_implementation_summary.react_helmet_replacement: SEOMetaTags.js uses direct DOM manipulation via useEffect
seo_implementation_summary.schema_injection: useSchema.js hook injects JSON-LD with unique IDs and cleanup on unmount
seo_implementation_summary.city_unique_content: CityUniqueContent.jsx with data from cityLocalData.js (22 cities)
seo_implementation_summary.brand_unique_content: BrandUniqueContent.jsx with data from brandLocalData.js (14 brands)
seo_implementation_summary.faq_schema_validation: buildFAQSchema filters out empty Q&A entries
